TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rgyax, title = Rgyax, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rgyax} }

S.FORM: alang Rgyax ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 74 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 235 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, Amis 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%.

alang Rgyax ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 74 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 235 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, Amis 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%.
S.PHON: alaŋ rɣjax ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu tajto ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%.
